goal: Phase 1 trigger-first revision-first local state model for Orun
notes: Task 0021 (M6 implementer) scoped on 2026-05-30 to land E2E + property gates per specs/orun-state-redesign/{implementation-plan.md §M6, test-plan.md §2/§3/§4/§8, design.md §9}. Base: main at 32d026f. Branch: impl/task-0021-m6-e2e-and-property-gates.

PR boundary (4 items): (1) cmd/orun/state_e2e_test.go — 15-step revision-first walk (plan→run→status→logs→describe revision latest→get plans→state migrate dry-run+idempotent) using internal/testfx/statefs.NewWorkspace, each step in its own t.Run, Cobra programmatic invocation (no os/exec). (2) internal/revision/keys_property_test.go — rapid-driven revision-key uniqueness + collision-suffix correctness per test-plan §3.2. (3) statestore concurrent decode-strict rapid property (or cite existing equivalent in local_prb_test.go). (4) Makefile test-state-redesign target: add -race + TestStateE2E invocation; keep coverage gates (statestore ≥95, revision ≥90, executionstate ≥90) unchanged.

Existing M6 substrate already in place: internal/triggerctx/ids_test.go TestTriggerKey_PropertyStabilityAndFormat (rapid), internal/executionstate/property_test.go TestNextExecutionKey_MonotonicityUnderConcurrency + TestSanitizeExecID_AlphabetProperty (rapid), internal/statestore/local_prb_test.go (CAS/atomicity/concurrent CreateIfAbsent), pgregory.net/rapid v1.1.0 pinned in go.mod, oklog/ulid/v2 v2.1.1 pinned, make test-state-redesign target shipped in Makefile lines 101-117 with the three coverage gates.

Non-goals enforced: no new feature surface (test-only/coverage-gate work), no production-code changes in the four state packages or cmd/orun/command_*.go (E2E test consumes them, doesn't modify them), no spec edits, no Option B trigger-name resolver-branch work (deferred), no MirrorModeHardlink debug-fold decision, no RunnerHooks.AfterStateUpdate re-architecture, no --persist-revision flag wiring, no coverage-threshold raises. Acceptance gates: go build/vet, make test-state-redesign, go test -race ./... -count=1 -timeout 300s, go test -race -run TestStateE2E -count=3 flake check.

Carry-forward into M6+ housekeeping (deferred OUT of 0021): MirrorModeHardlink debug-fold decision, RunnerHooks.AfterStateUpdate async-mirror evaluation, --persist-revision flag wiring, internal/executionstate coverage headroom (currently 90.0% exact floor — M6 E2E may bump organically), Option B trigger-name resolver branch from ai/proposals/task-0019-spec-update.md.
